programs.title: We Don't Need A Map
programs.desc: Filmmaker Warwick Thornton investigates our relationship to the Southern Cross, in this fun and thought provoking ride through Australia's cultural and political landscape.

programs.title: Hidden Volcano: Eruption From The Abyss
programs.desc: January 2022, the volcano Hunga Tonga erupts. It is the most powerful explosion ever recorded. Within minutes waves as high as a six-storey building, devastate the Pacific nation of Tonga.

programs.title: On Country Kitchen
programs.desc: Mark and Derek explore the historic ghost town of Joadja, now a whiskey and gin distillery run by the Jimenez family. Later in Gerringong, they stumble upon a coffee plantation on a picturesque hill.

programs.title: The Cook Up With Adam Liaw
programs.desc: Esteemed chef, Christine Manfield and Enter Via Laundry's founder, Helly Raichura join Adam to celebrate the concept of the communal table - food made for sharing.

programs.title: Spartakus And The Sun Beneath The Sea
programs.desc: The slave Tada was charged with carrying the sacred insignia of his office to the King of Benin. If he accomplishes this assignment, he will be finally a man free.

programs.title: The Mysterious Cities Of Gold
programs.desc: The original 80s animation classic that follows a young orphan called Esteban as he searches the New World for both his father and the mysterious Cities of Gold.
